series_metadata.series_title: Affirmation of voter who does not possess any appropriate identification for voting purposes
series_metadata.series_description: Affirmation of voter who does not possess any appropriate identification for voting purposes - (SOS prescribed form #10-T).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: For any Form 10-T completed prior to the May 6, 2014 primary election, retain two (2) years, then may destroy. For any Form 10-T completed during the May 6, 2014 primary election, retain until May 6, 2016, then may destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
